zh.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson是Jörgen Nilsson和Mrs. Jörgen的兒子，出生。他和Brita Jönsdotter至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson是Jörgen Nilsson和Mrs. Jörgen的儿子，出生。他和Brita Jönsdotter至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Jörgensson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nels, Alf, Erik, Iver, Jorgen, Dagny, Einer, Helmer, Hjalmer, Holger, Knute, Ove.

Americanized form of Danish or Norwegian Jørgensen and North German Jörgensen (see Jorgensen ), and of the much less common Swedish cognate Jörgensson (rarely Jörgenson). Compare Jergensen and Jergenson .

variants.name: Jorgensen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Jorgen, Nels, Lars, Niels, Holger, Anders, Borge, Einer, Folmer, Morten, Bjorn.

Danish and Norwegian (Jørgensen); North German (Jörgensen): patronymic from the personal name Jørgen, Jörgen, from Greek Geōrgios (see George ). Compare Jergensen , Jergenson , Jorgenson , and Yorgensen .

nameMeanings.name: Rötger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rüdiger
meanings: from hrōd ‘fame’ + gēr ‘spear’. This is the name of a hero in the Nibelungenlied. See Roger .

en.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson was born as the son of Jörgen Nilsson and Mrs. Jörgen. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Brita Jönsdotter.

fr.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson est né, fils de Jörgen Nilsson et Mrs. Jörgen. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Brita Jönsdotter.

de.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson wurde, als Sohn von Jörgen Nilsson und Mrs. Jörgen geboren. Er hatte mit Brita Jönsdotter mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson è nato il come figlio di Jörgen Nilsson e Mrs. Jörgen. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Brita Jönsdotter.

ja.lifeSummary: Rötger JörgenssonはJörgen NilssonとMrs. Jörgenの息子として生まれた。彼はBrita Jönsdotterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson(은)는 Jörgen Nilsson(와)과 Mrs. Jörgen의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Brita Jönsdotter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson nasceu filho de Jörgen Nilsson e Mrs. Jörgen. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Brita Jönsdotter.

ru.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson родился. Его родителей звали Jörgen Nilsson и Mrs. Jörgen. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Brita Jönsdotter.

es.lifeSummary: Rötger Jörgensson nació como hijo de Jörgen Nilsson y Mrs. Jörgen. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Brita Jönsdotter.
